features: SOMEONE LIKE ME – Our Wilkinson Sword Intuition Sensitive Care razor blades have protective guard wires helping prevent nicks and cuts. Perfect for all skin types.
FOR A MORE CONFIDENT YOU - The smoothing treatment is saturated with Aloe that will give you hydrated silky smooth skin, leaving you feeling confident in your appearance.
ATTRACTIVE HANDLE – designed in a soft rubber with great grip for a comfortable hold and follows the contours of the body for a smooth shave.
LEAVES YOUR SKIN FEELING SOFT – Skin moisturising soap bar formulated with Aloe Vera, Vitamin E, and pro Vitamin B5 providing you with a fresh glow and healthier looking skin.
GOOD FOR DIFFERENT AREAS OF THE BODY - includes a pivoting head which follows the contours of the body for a clean and close shave.
PACK CONTAINS: This is a pack of 4 blade refills
description: Product Description For many women, juggling life challenges and errands whilst trying to stay looking good can be hard. Now, busy women can cut their shaving routine in half with this convenient razor that lathers and shaves in one step - without the need for soap - just add water. Wilkinson Sword Intuition Sensitive Care with all-new pro-vitamin B5 plus Aloe and Vitamin E provides you with everything you need in one simple and convenient tool - leaving you to get on with the important things in life! The razor is designed with a pivoting head to closely follow the contours of your body. Boasts four blades and skin moisturising solid. Dermatologically tested. Pack contains x3 blade refills. Ingredients Sodium Palmitate, Sodium Cocoate, Sodium Isostearate, Aqua, Potassium Palmitate, Glycerin, Sodium Isostearoyl Lactylate, Potassium Cocoate, Kaolin, Potassium Isostearate, Sucrose Cocoate, Titanium Dioxide, Sodium Chloride, PEG-50 Shea Butter, Tocopheryl Acetate, Pentasodium Pentetate, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Isostearic Acid, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Parfum, Linalool, CI 77288, Strip ingredients: PVP, PEG-115M, PEG-7M, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Tocopheryl Acetate, Maltodextrin Directions To use Intuition Sensitive Razor Blades, remove the used cartridge by gently pulling the end of the cartridge. Insert the new cartridge into the shaver handle, making sure it is aligned. Before shaving, apply a small amount of shaving foam or gel to your skin. Shave with smooth and even movements. Rinse the razor after use and wipe it with a soft cloth. To prolong the life of the cartridge, clean it regularly and lubricate if necessary. Legal Disclaimer Intuition Naturals Razor Blades 3 Pack The only razor to lather and moisturise during shaving Save time and money on healthy skin without compromise Why use 3 razors when all you really need is one! Intuition razors are the first 4-in-1 razors to lather, shave and moisturise in one easy step, giving your skin that naturally healthy glow. Simple and convenient, it’s the perfect razor for busy women and mums on the go. The features • Lathers, shaves and moisturises in one simple step - just add water • Physical wear indicator lets you know when to replace your blades • Dermatologically tested, hypo-allergenic and fragrance free The benefits of aloe vera: • helps the hydration of your skin • encourages renewal of skin cells, and soothes your skin • supports your immune system • reduces scarring • soothes sunburn • promotes anti-ageing as the vitamin C and E help the skin to maintain its firmness and protect from dehydration. Box Contains 1x box 3 blade refills Manufacturer Contact Information Wilkinson Sword GmbH, Schützenstrasse 110, 42659 Solingen, Germany. See more
